pages.markdown: Customer workflow automation # Turn customer handoffs into reliable workflows. AcmeFlow helps B2B SaaS teams coordinate onboarding, renewals, implementation tasks, and customer escalations across sales, success, support, and product teams. [Book a demo](http://localhost:3001/demo)[View pricing](http://localhost:3001/pricing) ![AcmeFlow dashboard showing revenue workflow automation](/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Facmeflow-dashboard.png&w=3840&q=75) Live workflow snapshot New enterprise kickoffOn track Security reviewQueued API handoffQueued Renewal riskQueued ## For customer success Automate onboarding plans and renewal handoffs. ## For sales engineers Track security reviews, API questions, and implementation blockers. ## For operations teams Standardize playbooks, approvals, and reporting. Integrations ## Connect the tools your revenue team already uses. Agents and operators can find our CRM, chat, analytics, and warehouse integrations from a dedicated integrations page. [Salesforce](http://localhost:3001/integrations)[HubSpot](http://localhost:3001/integrations)[Slack](http://localhost:3001/integrations)[Google Workspace](http://localhost:3001/integrations)[Microsoft Teams](http://localhost:3001/integrations)[Zapier](http://localhost:3001/integrations) Pricing starts at $49 ## Compare Starter, Growth, and Enterprise plans. [See plan details](http://localhost:3001/pricing)

pages.visibleText: AcmeFlowPricingDocsIntegrationsSecurityCustomersSupportBook demoAPI docsREST API and webhooks for AcmeFlow workflows.Developers can read account, workflow, event, and webhook resources. Production API credentials are managed by admins.AuthenticationAPI requests use bearer tokens created by an account admin. Tokens can be scoped to read-only or workflow write access.Example endpointsGET /v1/accounts POST /v1/workflows GET /v1/events POST /v1/webhooks/testAcmeFlowAcmeFlow is a fictional B2B SaaS fixture used by AgentLayer tests and demos. The data on this site is intentionally public and non-sensitive.PrivacyTermsContact salesSupportAPI Docs | AcmeFlow
pages.markdown: API docs # REST API and webhooks for AcmeFlow workflows. Developers can read account, workflow, event, and webhook resources. Production API credentials are managed by admins. ## Authentication API requests use bearer tokens created by an account admin. Tokens can be scoped to read-only or workflow write access. ## Example endpoints GET /v1/accounts POST /v1/workflows GET /v1/events POST /v1/webhooks/test

pages.markdown: Customers # Customer stories for B2B SaaS revenue and success teams. AcmeFlow is designed for customer success, sales engineering, support operations, and implementation teams. ## Northstar Analytics Reduced implementation handoff delays by standardizing launch tasks. ## OrbitDesk Connected support escalations to product feedback workflows. ## HelioStack Used AcmeFlow playbooks to coordinate Enterprise security reviews.

pages.markdown: Docs # Documentation for building reliable customer workflows. Find setup guides, API docs, webhook references, role configuration, and integration walkthroughs. ## Getting started Create your first onboarding workflow and invite teammates. [Read more](http://localhost:3001/docs) ## Workflow templates Use repeatable playbooks for implementation, renewals, and escalations. [Read more](http://localhost:3001/docs) ## Roles and permissions Configure admin, operator, viewer, and auditor roles. [Read more](http://localhost:3001/docs) ## API documentation Use REST APIs and webhooks to sync workflow events. [Read more](http://localhost:3001/docs/api)

pages.description: AcmeFlow pricing plans for Starter, Growth, and Enterprise teams.

h1: Plans for B2B SaaS teams from first playbook to enterprise governance.

openGraph.og:title: AcmeFlow
openGraph.og:description: Customer workflow automation for B2B SaaS teams.
openGraph.twitter:title: AcmeFlow
openGraph.twitter:description: Customer workflow automation for B2B SaaS teams.

pages.visibleText: AcmeFlowPricingDocsIntegrationsSecurityCustomersSupportBook demoPricingPlans for B2B SaaS teams from first playbook to enterprise governance.AcmeFlow offers transparent monthly pricing for Starter and Growth teams. Enterprise plans are quoted through sales after a security and workflow review.Starter$49per monthFor small revenue teams organizing repeatable onboarding work.Included features and limits- 5 workspaces- CRM sync- Shared playbooks- Email supportStart with demoGrowth$149per monthFor growing SaaS teams that need handoff automation and reporting.Included features and limits- 25 workspaces- Slack alerts- Workflow approvals- Priority supportStart with demoEnterpriseContact salesannual contractsFor larger organizations with governance and security review needs.Included features and limits- Unlimited workspaces- SSO/SAML- Audit exports- Security review packetContact salesPlan differencesStarter focuses on shared playbooks, Growth adds Slack alerts and approvals, and Enterprise adds SSO/SAML, audit exports, and a security review packet for larger organizations.AcmeFlowAcmeFlow is a fictional B2B SaaS fixture used by AgentLayer tests and demos. The data on this site is intentionally public and non-sensitive.PrivacyTermsContact salesSupportPricing | AcmeFlow
pages.markdown: Pricing # Plans for B2B SaaS teams from first playbook to enterprise governance. AcmeFlow offers transparent monthly pricing for Starter and Growth teams. Enterprise plans are quoted through sales after a security and workflow review. ## Starter $49 per month For small revenue teams organizing repeatable onboarding work. ### Included features and limits - \- 5 workspaces - \- CRM sync - \- Shared playbooks - \- Email support [Start with demo](http://localhost:3001/demo) ## Growth $149 per month For growing SaaS teams that need handoff automation and reporting. ### Included features and limits - \- 25 workspaces - \- Slack alerts - \- Workflow approvals - \- Priority support [Start with demo](http://localhost:3001/demo) ## Enterprise Contact sales annual contracts For larger organizations with governance and security review needs. ### Included features and limits - \- Unlimited workspaces - \- SSO/SAML - \- Audit exports - \- Security review packet [Contact sales](http://localhost:3001/demo) ## Plan differences Starter focuses on shared playbooks, Growth adds Slack alerts and approvals, and Enterprise adds SSO/SAML, audit exports, and a security review packet for larger organizations.

pages.markdown: Privacy policy # How the fictional AcmeFlow demo describes privacy. This policy page exists so AgentLayer can find a clear privacy source during scans. ## Privacy summary AcmeFlow collects account contact information, workspace configuration, and workflow event data for providing the fictional service. The demo does not collect real personal information. ## Retention and deletion Customers may request account export or deletion by contacting privacy@acmeflow.example. Support confirms identity before processing account deletion requests.

pages.visibleText: AcmeFlowPricingDocsIntegrationsSecurityCustomersSupportBook demoSecurity and trustSecurity information for teams evaluating AcmeFlow.This page gives agents a clear source for trust, access control, privacy, and review packet information without inventing compliance claims.Data protectionCustomer workflow data is encrypted in transit and at rest in the fictional AcmeFlow demo.Access controlsEnterprise workspaces can configure SSO/SAML, role-based permissions, and audit exports.Compliance postureA security review packet is available for Enterprise evaluation. This demo does not claim certification.Incident contactSecurity questions can be sent to security@acmeflow.example.AcmeFlowAcmeFlow is a fictional B2B SaaS fixture used by AgentLayer tests and demos. The data on this site is intentionally public and non-sensitive.PrivacyTermsContact salesSupportSecurity | AcmeFlow
pages.markdown: Security and trust # Security information for teams evaluating AcmeFlow. This page gives agents a clear source for trust, access control, privacy, and review packet information without inventing compliance claims. ## Data protection Customer workflow data is encrypted in transit and at rest in the fictional AcmeFlow demo. ## Access controls Enterprise workspaces can configure SSO/SAML, role-based permissions, and audit exports. ## Compliance posture A security review packet is available for Enterprise evaluation. This demo does not claim certification. ## Incident contact Security questions can be sent to security@acmeflow.example.

pages.markdown: Terms # Terms, cancellation, and refund information. This page gives agents a specific source for legal and cancellation questions. ## Service terms AcmeFlow is a fictional product fixture. Paid subscriptions would be governed by an order form and service agreement reviewed by the customer. ## Cancellation and refunds Starter and Growth plans may be cancelled before the next billing period. Enterprise cancellations and refunds follow the signed order form. Contact support@acmeflow.example for cancellation requests.

recommendations.title: Review and publish the agent action manifest
recommendations.whyItMatters: The scan found operable actions, but agents still need a stable public manifest instead of re-inferring forms from HTML.
recommendations.howToFix: Review the generated .well-known/agents.json, keep human confirmation on sensitive actions, and publish the approved manifest.
